=== windows ===

[[../shell/cmd.wiki|cmd]]
[[../shell/powershell.wiki|powershell]]


Important files:
	Location: 	Description:
	C:\Windows\Temp => directory normally open to every user with read write and execute permissions.
	C:\Users\{user}\AppData\Local\Temp => same as the above for only for an specific user.
	C:\Users\Public => directory normally open to every user with read write and execute permissions. Used for sharing things between users.
	C:\Program Files => folder for 64-bit.
	C:\Program Files (x86) => Folder for all 32-bit.
